what_it_does: This file is a YAML-frontmatter ledger record that declares an attachment named att-cb074581 in the dragnet-development channel, typed as board_items, and points it at board item item-c3065804 with an added timestamp.
observations: The entire content is YAML frontmatter; there is no body text.
The target is a board:// URI referencing item-c3065804.
standouts: The target uses a board:// URI scheme to reference an external board item.
The file is purely metadata with no explanatory prose.
concerns: The file contains no context about why the attachment is linked to the board item.
The referenced board item content is not included, so the attachment's meaning is opaque from this file alone.
notes: A minimal channel-memory attachment record that links att-cb074581 to board item item-c3065804 in dragnet-development.
questions: What content or artifact does board item item-c3065804 represent?
Why was this attachment created for that specific board item?
Is the board:// target resolvable elsewhere in the ledger?
purpose_vs_actual: The presumed purpose is to record an attachment-to-board-item link, and the content does exactly that.
intention_signals: It appears intended to create a durable, timestamped association between a channel attachment and a specific board item for later retrieval or audit.
novelty: The use of a board:// URI scheme as a target reference inside an attachment metadata record.
contribution: It preserves the provenance and cross-reference that attachment att-cb074581 in dragnet-development is associated with board item item-c3065804 as of the recorded timestamp.
summary_for_embedding: A YAML-frontmatter channel attachment record linking att-cb074581 in dragnet-development to board item item-c3065804 via a board:// URI with an added timestamp.
intention_for_embedding: To record and make discoverable the relationship between a channel attachment and a specific board item.
